summary: TWO_COLUMN: 3 color-coded 5×4 matrices Q (BLUE), K (GREEN), V (RED) at top-left with color intensity from |value|; always_redraw YELLOW box highlights active query row as ValueTracker query_idx cycles 0..4. RIGHT bar chart shows softmax(Q·K^T/√d) weights via always_redraw; live weighted output = Σ w_k V_k.
